settings.announcement_text: Complimentary monogramming on all orders over $500. Shop the SS 2026 Collection.

settings.heading: Where the wild is refined.
settings.subheading: Outerwear for the person who skis Banff in January and anchors off the Exumas in July. Built for both. Compromises for neither.

settings.title: Two worlds. One wardrobe.
settings.body: There is a certain kind of person who does not choose between adventure and elegance. They expect both. They move between the alpine and the ocean with the same ease they move between a board meeting and a dinner reservation.
settings.body2: TAKL is built for them. Technical enough for the mountain. Refined enough for the room.

settings.label: Alpine Collection
settings.title: The mountain demands everything.
settings.body: Technical outerwear engineered for altitude. Waterproof membranes, insulated with recycled fill, sealed seams, and cut for full range of motion on the slope.

settings.label: Coastal Collection
settings.title: The water asks nothing less.
settings.body: Lightweight performance fabrics that breathe in the heat and resist salt air. From the dock to the dinner table — no wardrobe change required.

settings.title: Materials
settings.body: Merino, pima cotton, technical nylon, recycled fill. Sourced from certified mills in Italy, Japan, and New Zealand.

settings.title: Construction
settings.body: Reinforced seams, YKK hardware, and tailoring techniques adapted from alpine guiding tradition.

settings.title: Testing
settings.body: Every product field-tested in Banff, Patagonia, and the Bahamian out-islands before a single unit is sold.

settings.title: Guarantee
settings.body: Free lifetime repairs on every TAKL garment. Built to last. Backed to last longer.

settings.quote: There is no conflict between the mountain and the marina. TAKL was built on that belief.

settings.title: First access. Always.
settings.body: Limited drops, private events, and early access to new collections — sent only to those who know what to look for.
